basic_details.job_title: NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JGM, Senior Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL)
basic_details.short_information: National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) Various Managerial Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 16-05-2026 on the official website NHSRCL Official Website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the NHSRCL Various Managerial Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation: 5 years for candidates belonging to Jammu & Kashmir who had ordinarily been domiciled in that state between 01.01.1980 and 31.12.1989.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical / Mechanical/ Electronics Engineering or equivalent, Graduation in any discipline with full time master’s degree in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Corporate Communications, Visual communication, Marketing communication, Advertising or MBA in relevant stream
qualification.details: JGM (Rolling Stock): B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or equivalent. Senior Manager (Rolling Stock): B.E./ B.Tech in Electrical / Mechanical/ Electronics Engineering or equivalent. Assistant Public Relations Manager: Graduation in any discipline with a full time master’s degree in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Corporate Communications, Visual communication, Marketing communication, Advertising OR MBA in relevant stream from any recognized university/ Institute.

salary_details.details: JGM (Rolling Stock): Rs. 90,000 – 2,40,000 (E6) Per Month Senior Manager (Rolling Stock): Rs. 70,000 – 2,00,000 (E4) Per Month Assistant Public Relations Manager: Rs. 50,000 – 1,60,000 (CE2) Per Month

selection_process: Screening of applications Presentation on jobs handled Document Verification Personal Interview Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration and application submission for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various managerial posts in the NHSRCL Recruitment 2026. These include positions like JGM (Rolling Stock), Senior Manager (Rolling Stock), and Assistant Public Relations Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Public Relations Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Public Relations Manager post, candidates need to have a Graduation in any discipline along with a full-time master’s degree in Mass Communication, Public Relations, Journalism, Corporate Communications, Visual communication, Marketing communication, Advertising, or an MBA in a relevant stream.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the managerial posts announced in NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is ₹400. However, SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the JGM (Rolling Stock) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the JGM (Rolling Stock) position will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 90,000 to Rs. 2,40,000 per month (E6 level).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 includes screening of applications, a presentation on jobs handled, document verification, a personal interview, and a medical examination.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the application form on the official NHSRCL website before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be uploaded during the application process?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to upload necessary documents such as their photograph, signature, and relevant educational and professional certificates in the prescribed format. Specific details will be available in the official notification.

faq.answer: The last date for online registration and application submission for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.
